note: The contract for lexical URL features. Consumed by RiskEngine models, by Core's risk-scorer agent, and by ScamPulse's dbt models, which must emit columns matching these names and dtypes. Changing any field, or changing any data file under features/data/, requires a new spec_version - feature values must never drift under a fixed version. Feature values also depend on the pinned tldextract version, because public-suffix resolution determines subdomain and registered-domain boundaries. v3 removes had_scheme: it encoded corpus provenance rather than a property of the URL, and cannot carry the same meaning at inference time. v4 removes scheme_is_https for the same class of reason as v3 removed had_scheme: it encodes which upstream file a row came from rather than a property of the address, and here the learned direction is inverted relative to production.

features.name: parse_ok
features.description: 1 if the input parsed to a non-empty host, else 0 with all other fields neutral.

features.name: url_length
features.description: Character length of the stripped raw input.

features.name: host_length
features.description: Character length of the lowercased host.

features.name: path_length
features.description: Character length of the path component.

features.name: query_length
features.description: Character length of the query string.

features.name: fragment_length
features.description: Character length of the fragment.

features.name: num_path_segments
features.description: Count of non-empty slash-separated path segments.

features.name: num_query_params
features.description: Count of non-empty ampersand-separated query parameters.

features.name: num_dots_host
features.description: Dot count in the host.

features.name: num_hyphens_host
features.description: Hyphen count in the host. Elevated in impersonation domains such as sbi-kyc-verify.

features.name: num_subdomains
features.description: Labels in the subdomain portion, per public-suffix resolution. 0 for IP hosts.

features.name: longest_host_label_len
features.description: Length of the longest dot-separated host label.

features.name: host_is_ip
features.description: 1 if the host is a literal IP address.

features.name: host_is_ipv6
features.description: 1 if the host is a bracketed IPv6 literal.

features.name: has_port
features.description: 1 if an explicit port was present.

features.name: has_punycode
features.description: 1 if any host label is punycode-encoded (xn--), the homograph-attack signal.

features.name: has_at_symbol
features.description: 1 if an @ appears in the netloc, which can hide the true host from a reader.

features.name: has_double_slash_in_path
features.description: 1 if the path contains a doubled slash, a common redirect-injection marker.

features.name: num_encoded_chars
features.description: Count of percent-encoded octets in the raw input.

features.name: host_digit_ratio
features.description: Fraction of host characters that are digits.

features.name: url_digit_ratio
features.description: Fraction of raw-input characters that are digits.

features.name: host_entropy
features.description: Shannon entropy of the host in bits per character. High values indicate algorithmically generated domains.

features.name: path_entropy
features.description: Shannon entropy of the path in bits per character.

features.name: tld
features.description: Final label of the public suffix, empty string when unresolvable. Categorical: encoded downstream, never fed raw to a model.

features.name: tld_length
features.description: Character length of the tld field.

features.name: suspicious_tld
features.description: 1 if the tld appears in the versioned suspicious-TLD list.

features.name: is_shortener
features.description: 1 if the registered domain is a known URL shortener, meaning the destination is unknown without unshortening.

features.name: keyword_hits_total
features.description: Sum of hits across all keyword categories.

features.name: keyword_hits_auth
features.description: Distinct auth-category tokens found in host+path+query.

features.name: keyword_hits_payment
features.description: Distinct payment-category tokens found.

features.name: keyword_hits_urgency
features.description: Distinct urgency-category tokens found.

features.name: keyword_hits_reward
features.description: Distinct reward-category tokens found.

features.name: brand_in_host
features.description: 1 if a known brand token appears anywhere in the host.

features.name: brand_domain_mismatch
features.description: 1 if a brand token appears in the host but the registered domain is not one of that brand's official domains. The primary impersonation signal.

features.name: brand_min_distance
features.description: Minimum edit distance from the registered domain label to any brand token, reported only when below 4; anything at or above 4 is reported as the cap of 64. Values of 1-3 indicate typosquatting, 0 an exact token match, 64 no near match. The bound exists because larger distances carry no signal and computing them dominated extraction cost.
